entry.title: Display the "header" column in the same row than "position" column
entry.content: I ran the MB5L report (Display Warehouse Stocks of Material) and would like to have "header" column on the same row than "position" column. Right now, my "Header" column is above my "position" column which make the data processing difficult. Thanks in advance for your help.

entry.title: S4/HANA, CJI3N, display asset number involved in cost line items
entry.content:
Hi experts, need you help please!

Is there a way to display asset number involved in cost line items with CJI3N transaction code or with any other transaction code ? Thank you! 

Ex : I have my PO assigned to a wbs element, wbs linked to AUC, when I run settlement the costs are assigned to AUC. Now when using the CJI3N reports I need to see the AUC number without double clicking on cost line item....

Is there an other transaction code offering this ? 

Thank you!

entry.title: Credit segment change for sales area
entry.content:
Hi,

Client wants to change credit segment assigned to a sales area / company code. But there are 2 years worth of transactional data in the system for this entity. What would be the impacts of changing the credit segment now for open orders, master data, invoices posted, etc.?

FIN (Finance) #credit management #FSCM

Regards,
Vishnu

entry.title: Process order settlement with actual quantity
entry.content:
Dear Experts.

we are into Processing industry and our business scenario is that we will make a standard BOM with Co Products. One Input and multiple Output, we will provide in the equivalence in MM, while processing the order there may be chance that few output co product will not get process and this result in PRD. At the time of ML, this PRD is not allocated to material since no output quantity resulting in non allocated or not distributed PRD. Now our business want to allocate this PRD to other products during the month end.

Please suggest the best way allocate this PRD. We are in SAP S4 1909

entry.title: Budget Transfer Error - Budget is negative
entry.content:
Good Day Experts.

I am having challenges on budget transfer, i recently configured the system not to allow negative budget transfers using Check Libraries already defined by SAP in the SAP NOTE: 983853 as shown by the screenshots below.  My challenge is even if i want to transfer amounts which are not negative i still get the budget is negative message. Kindly assist,

entry.title: RE-Fx flow type involved when a contract is interrupted before the end date
entry.content:
Dear SAP team, 

we would like to be sure to have all the needed Flow type customized in our system, so I am writing to ask which is the proper one the system will trigger in case of an interruption during the life the contract life?  That means the contract"s life is stopped before its end date. In this case we expected a loss due to asset retirement so the Flow type should manage the Lease Debit versus Loss gl account. 

Thanks a lot in advance for your smart support

Regards

Donatella

entry.title: How to create the Credit Management (SAP S/4HANA CLOUD 2408)
entry.content:
How to create the Advance Credit Management for S4hana Public Cloud

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Vendor: Withholding Tax NOT extended in new company code
entry.content:
Hi,

I have the next issue, when I create an existing supplier for a new company code in the BP tcode.


In the company code data section, I select "create with reference" but then upon entering, I check Vendor: Withholding Tax and the data isnt replicated in the new company code.

In ECC this situation didnt occur with tcode XK01 created as a model.

Please, I need to understand if it is possible in S/4

Thanks

entry.title: Hi,
entry.content:
why chart of accounts and fiscal year variant must be same for two company codes to assign them to a single controlling area?

Regards.

Sirisha

entry.title: Custom CDS view for Invoice Summary Creation
entry.content:
We would like to create a customized Invoice Summary for our customers by modifying the standard Invoice Summary template and linking it to other systems.

However, the standard CDS view for the Invoice Summary has not yet been released. Additionally, we understand that there is currently no API available, and the scalability of the standard functionality is limited.

Although this requirement is already listed for development in the Customer Influence platform, no announcement has been made regarding its release timeline. This creates a significant risk to our project schedule.
(https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/322650/?section=sectionDetails)

Given the high likelihood that the necessary SAP development will not be completed in time, we need to explore alternative solutions. Do you have any suggestions?

entry.title: Error-assigning a company code to a controlling area
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

When I follow the path mentioned below, I have an error:

Path: SPRO >> enterprise structure >> assignment >> controlling >> assign company code to controlling area >> select a controlling area >> clicking on (assignment of company code) >> new entries >> select a company code >> save (button) >> error

Kindly find the images of the error attached

Kindly tell me how to solve this issue

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Issue with Automatic Cancellation of Purchase Invoice in Intercompany Billing
entry.content:
After canceling a sales invoice using transaction code VF11, the corresponding purchase invoice on the receiving side is not automatically canceled. As a result, the accounting document on the receiving side remains active, and manual cancellation is required.

Is it standard SAP functionality that the purchase invoice is not automatically canceled when a sales invoice is canceled via VF11? If this is not the standard behavior, could you please advise on how to configure the system to automatically reverse the related purchase invoice when the sales invoice is canceled?

entry.title: Migration Cockpit Usage for Loading New Assets
entry.content:
Hello,

 

We are seeking clarification regarding the capabilities of the SAP Migration Cockpit, specifically in the context of asset management. Our question is whether the Migration Cockpit can be utilized to load new assets into the system, as opposed to its typical use case of migrating legacy assets from a previous system.

 

We would appreciate guidance on the following points:

  1. Can the Migration Cockpit be configured or adapted for the purpose of uploading new assets directly?
  2. Are there any specific templates, configurations, or prerequisites required for this use case?
  3. If the Migration Cockpit is not intended for this scenario, could you recommend alternative tools or best practices within SAP for efficiently handling the mass upload of new assets?

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: For Central Finance, can my source ERP have a different fiscal year than S4?
entry.content:
Hi All,

This questions is for those of you who have implement Central Finance as a stepping stone to S4.

I have a scenario where our source SAP ECC system which will feed into Central Finance has a fiscal year that need to be fixed to line up to the Corporate fiscal year.  In general, ECC is 1 day off each month end from the Corporate calendar.

Is it possible to load this ECC data into Central Finance and have S4 Finance on the corrected Corporate fiscal year?  

While correcting the ECC calendar might seem like the easier approach, there are a ton of dependencies to consider including open amortizing Rev Rec scheduled(maybe a million or more sales documents) that would require updating, thousands upon thousands of scheduled jobs and dependent variants that would need updating, and lastly the big reason why the ECC calendar was changed originally, the month end settlement jobs take upwards of 18hours to complete, moving them a day would mean a 1 day delay in the overall month end close.

Consultants are telling me we should just keep the existing ECC fiscal year and use that in S4 for these Company Codes.  That does not seem right, this is our change in S4 to correct this process and carrying over a bad business process just seems wrong for a solution that is designed specifically to integrate/replicate data from multiple ERP's in a single S4 instance, new and improved, not carry over all the bad stuff from legacy systems.

Ideas and details are appreciated

 

thanks

Nathan

entry.title: Any suggestions and solutions please? It's an urgent requirement. Thank you.
Extension ledgers in Public cloud
entry.content:
Hi, 

We've a customer interersted in extention ledgers and planning to use if for tax adjustments. I've been searching for any limitations related to extension ledgers in public cloud but can't find any specific number. Does this means that there isn't any limitations in how many extension ledgers that can be created in public cloud? Or could anyone please assist with some links of where I can find it. 

Second question related to ledgers is the ability to add ledgers after the inital implementation. I'm avare of that the Group Valuation (Ledger 4G) needs to be activated from start and can't be activated later on. But what about extension ledgers, is it the same with extension ledgers that they needs to be added in the implementation or is it possible to add them later on if needed? 

Kind Regards, Sanne

entry.title: FINT: DZ documents not picked for Interest calculation.
entry.content: In the transaction Code: FINT, the DZ documents against RV document are not picked the Interest calculation. Due to this various overdue interest is pending to post.

entry.title: "Number Range Status" in T code: SNUM
entry.content:
Hello SAP Team,

Need your inputs for question on "Number Range Status" in T code: SNUM

(1) What is the use of Number Range status. I was thinking that is the last used number by system from the range, but when I check the number displayed in Number Range status, it does not show any results

(2) Can we say that based on Number range status, we can estimate how much series of numbers available for that number range? Example: 999 Numbers available (19999 - 19000)

Number RangeFrom NumberTo NumberNumber Range StatusAvailable Numbers
XX100001999919000999

(3) We have a situation where "Number Range Status" and "To Number", the difference is reducing each day, does it mean documents will not be posted, if the difference will be ZERO? 

(4) What can the actions be taken based on scenario mentioned in (3)? 

Thank you in advance for your response

Thank you.

entry.title: Error "An exception was raised" in creating Bank Account in Fiori
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We've been creating a Bank Account but there's an error that keeps on showing. Bank, Housebank, Hierarchy and the Connectivity already done but when It comes to creating a Bank Account. It won't proceed.

Error shows "An exception was raised" when saving the Bank Account.

Appreciate your feedback on this. Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Error F5605 in trx F-28
entry.content:
Hi,

I am getting Error F5605 (Specify account for the difference posting) for company code B but not in company code A.

I checked the following path and it is empty for both Company Codes. No reason codes created:

Financial Accounting (New)–> Accounts Receivable and Accounts Payable–> Business Transactions–> Incoming Payments Incoming Payments Global Settings–> Overpayment/Underpayment–> Define Reason Codes (transaction OBBE).

I also checked trx FBKP (Automatic posting > Cash discount and payment differences > Payment differences by reason (ZDI)) and the GL account assignment for Debit and Credit is completed. This is at chat of accounts level.

I also checked trx OBXI for Cash discount expenses and the GL account assignment for Debit and Credit is complete. This is at chat of accounts level.

Thanks in advance for any help!!!

F
